'''Ruler Three''' was a member of the [[Ruling Power]] of [[Euceron]]. He was a tall [[Euceron (species)|Euceron]] living and administering in the capital city of [[Eusebus]].

Ruler Three, together with [[Ruler Six]] and [[Ruler Seven]], and the [[Games Council|Galactic Games Council]] in attendance, presided at the hearing following the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]] that sought to draw out the truth and error of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] charges against high-profile members of the Council.

Kenobi charged Council head [[Liviani Sarno]] and celebrated former Games champion and Council member [[Maxo Vista]] with the murder of Games "timing judge" [[Aarno Dering]], with attempted murder of untold numbers of spectator-citizens, and with both the "fixing" and sabotaging of events throughout the Galactic Games to falsely discredit, disgrace, and defame certain members of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] that opposed legislation highly favorable to members of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]. In the end, Ruler Three was not swayed by what he viewed to be the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] unsubstantial body of evidence and lack of witnesses. The Ruling Power's final decision in the matter thus allowed the guilty complicit parties, Sarno and Vista, to walk free.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}}
